structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-07-31 Arizona is Home for Tucson and Pima County
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-07-31 14:04:41-07:00

 

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Help your borrowers overcome one of the challenges of becoming a homeowner with the upcoming release of down payment assistance funds offered through the Pima IDA, in collaboration with the Arizona Department of Housing! Funds will be available starting Monday, August 4th, 2025!

 

PROGRAM DETAILS

*	$9000 downpayment assistance paired with a below market rate (rate to be announced once available)
*	75 homebuyers will receive assistance as a 30-year deferred forgivable second mortgage (0% interest)
*	Available to Arizona residents in Tucson and Pima County that are first-time homebuyers
*	Gross household income must not exceed 120% of AMI for Arizona, based on county and household (see attached flyer)
*	640+ FICO
*	45% DTI maximum 
*	No purchase price limits
*	SFR, Condo/Townhome, 2-4 Unit, and Manufactured Homes permitted

 

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Funds are limited and available on a first come, first served basis! 
*	Guidelines <https://files.constantcontact.com/6a60ea0a401/12c4e0fa-5f83-4464-a658-eba89383f658.pdf?rdr=true> 
*	Rates <https://www.ehousingplus.com/homeownership/pima-tucson-homebuyer-solution-pths/program-highlights/>  (TBD)
*	Join a live webinar hosted by eHousingPlus on Monday, August 4th at 11:00 AM MST. Click here to register for the webinar. <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qETKIgzSxcQauPgAFQ3xaeE5wnH8GV8E5_RaFoO_WBGEfr5GjeIElWxCTpdFLvCI92JrGrShEF_nQZ-qNgRRXu40gK77LSOwfTMTCvbhOwHv3s5RKThFnMki1T2QNWKURn1Ua-dg_qR5eGdpZ88Qc6F7PnVhrdiZRFS_oIyjW_v-x9jcfcnNy3yg2akDhtHT&c=6hA0oswf1eRtEsyY0iE0jKRYs6QUprb0zlkt2onrV-fR6chwnY_dKg==&ch=clQMf_gOEeEfpZj0JE3lYsoOjrSRLj1oACKSga4nCJrdS-2N3ZioOw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!XQp_6GhZvGKAlstT3XEGJqXMtc1nTjVaXN5MbadWTxA-KE7043BKQlqiBXtqE7eXDuMerJwWofDsAjUP7Jq2efwh$> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

 

Contact Us:
